overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing an FBI agent exploring a foggy forest and entering an abandoned general store. The character approaches an NPC at the entrance before investigating the dimly lit, cluttered interior with a flashlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest trail approaching abandoned building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path toward the General Store building visible through the trees

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming a dense canopy overhead
narrow dirt trail covered with fallen autumn leaves
wooden building with dark roof visible through the fog
weathered wooden posts along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense, foggy forest along a dirt path covered with fallen leaves. The abandoned General Store building is visible in the distance through the mist, framed by tall evergreen trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned general store entrance with wooden porch

events.description: NPC standing at entrance gestures with hands then turns and walks away into the forest
character walks through the front doorway entering the General Store building

agents.ego_description: approaching the store entrance, observing the NPC, then entering the dark building

notable_agents.action: standing at entrance with hands on hips, gestures while talking, then walks away into the woods
second FBI agent standing near the entrance observing the area

entered.detail: wooden sign with 'GENERAL STORE' text above the entrance
weathered wooden bench sitting on the porch
dark open doorway leading into the building interior

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest path to the General Store entrance where an NPC stands near the door. The NPC gestures and walks away as the character approaches. A second FBI agent is visible to the right. The character then enters the dark doorway of the abandoned store.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned general store front area with laundry machines

events.description: character turns left and shines flashlight on the washing machine area

agents.ego_description: exploring the abandoned store interior, examining the laundry area and debris with a flashlight

entered.detail: row of white front-loading washing machines against the left wall
wooden service counter with papers and items on top
white drop ceiling with fluorescent panels and water stains
concrete floor covered with trash, leaves, and abandoned items
window with closed white blinds letting in diffused light

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit General Store, the character explores the front area with a flashlight. Rows of white washing machines line the left wall while a wooden service counter sits on the right. The floor is littered with debris and fallen leaves, and the ceiling shows signs of water damage.

scene_state.functional_zone: back storage room with ladder and workbench

events.description: character moves from the front laundry area into the back storage room

agents.ego_description: moving deeper into the store, investigating the cluttered back storage area with ladder and workbench

entered.detail: tall red aluminum step ladder standing in the center of the room
metal workbench with tools and boxes scattered on top
stacked cardboard boxes and scattered debris on the floor
metal shelving units with various items and boxes

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the back storage room of the abandoned store, passing a red step ladder and metal workbench. The area is cluttered with cardboard boxes, metal shelving, and debris. Light filters through a rear window with blinds as the character continues exploring the dark interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, atmospheric forest into the claustrophobic, cluttered interior of an abandoned general store. It begins by tracking along a leaf-strewn dirt path through dense fog and towering evergreens, with the store building appearing as a distant silhouette in the mist. As the character emerges from the woods, the scene shifts to the store's entrance where an NPC gestures and departs, leading the camera past another agent and through the dark doorway. The environment then transitions into a dimly lit interior where a flashlight illuminates rows of white washing machines and a wooden service counter amidst debris and water-damaged ceilings. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into a cramped back storage room, passing a red step ladder and metal workbenches toward a rear window where faint light filters through the blinds.
